Foreign Ports Frequently Receive Alaskan Pollock

Nearly 41 million kilograms of pollock products, largely from Alaska, was shipped in 2025. Most

shipments stopped over — or ended up in — Germany, South Korea or The Netherlands.

Stade

Busan

Bremerhaven

Rotterdam

Ching Tao

0

5,000,000 kg

2,500,000 kg

7,500,000 kg

10,000,000 kg

2025 Data from ImportGenius
